repo_prior_art.cite: eid_bjs_efficient_event_study_v1: Quotient row-space IF frontier Gamma_m(pi,Sigma,a) tau = 0 for BJS/SA/CS/W

published_prior_art.cite: none; BJS2024, Sun-Abraham2021, Callaway-SantAnna2021, and Wooldridge2023 do not give a joint four-estimator IF-equivalence iff frontier

repo_prior_art.cite: eid_bjs_efficient_event_study_v1: variance-gap quotient norm around Gamma_m tau, but with unresolved covariance/projection convention

published_prior_art.cite: borusyak_jaravel_spiess_2024_restud and chen_santanna_xie_2025 give efficiency/EIF benchmarks, not this four-estimator contrast-covariance formula

repo_prior_art.cite: eid_bjs_efficient_event_study_v1 Theorem: aggregation equality is not an IF equality certificate

published_prior_art.cite: goodman_bacon_2021_joe and dechaisemartin_dhaultfoeuille_2020_aer show TWFE weighting pathologies, not this four-modern-estimator equal-target unequal-IF witness

repo_prior_art.cite: eid_bjs_efficient_event_study_v1: earlier projection-loss object was non-unique; this is a specified but closely related BJS-projection repair

published_prior_art.cite: wooldridge_2023_ectj gives restricted imputation/regression equivalences, not a universal BJS correction map over four estimator loadings

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: tier=field below novelty_target=flagship: the constructive object C(pi,Sigma,G,T,a) is advertised as primitive, but Exhibit 9.1 supplies estimator score blocks Z_m^circ and S_m rather than deriving them from cohort-period primitives.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The variance-gap identity drops the component of IF_m - IF_BJS lying in the BJS span; defining S_m^perp and K_m only gives the orthogonal-part variance, not the full Avar difference without an additional zero-projection or efficiency condition.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The finite witness proves algebra for displayed loadings, but the assumptions do not connect the displayed Z_m^circ normal-equation blocks to the named BJS, SA, CS, and Wooldridge estimators.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 3
soundness_flags.one_line: With support-complete correction, Pi_BJS(R_m)=R_m-(R_m-R_BJS)P_B recovers R_BJS essentially by unfolding the projection definition; the proof route currently has fewer than three non-trivial steps beyond the assumption.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Derive the Exhibit 9.1 Z_m, Q_m, S_m, and L_m blocks from the actual cohort-period cells and the four published estimators, instead of taking the contrast rows as supplied primitives.
Add an explicit condition under which the BJS-span projection term in IF_m - IF_BJS has zero contribution to the Avar gap, or restate Conjecture 2 as only the orthogonal residual variance.
Separate the repo increment from eid_bjs_efficient_event_study_v1 by proving a genuinely new closed-form or algorithmic construction of C, with input format and rank conditions.

recommended_next_step: Patch the proposal by deriving the estimator-specific normal equations from primitives and repairing the variance decomposition before asking for another flagship-tier review.
